issues.description: Action type is 'ReturnToHand' but effect text says 'Place at the bottom of the owner's deck' - should be a deck placement action, not return to hand
Target scope is 'ChooseOwnCharacter' but effect says 'with a cost of 1 or less' - needs cost condition in target or as separate condition
Missing 'maxCost' constraint on target - text specifies 'cost of 1 or less'
